name: Talked to workers comp adjuster after fall, did I mess up?

mainEntity.name: Talked to workers comp adjuster after fall, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe; stop talking, get lawyer to handle adjuster.
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly—adjusters minimize claims; don't sign releases or give recorded statements without lawyer. Statements can twist against you[11]. Key factors: Politely end calls, note details. Attorney reviews transcripts. Damage control possible.

description: Maybe; stop talking, get lawyer to handle adjuster.
